prs.title: refactors readiness thermometer, implements it into slide deck
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Refactors the readiness thermometer component, extracts shared utility logic, and integrates it into the slide deck across 6 files with 48 custom lines — a modest but meaningful refactor and feature integration.

prs.title: introduces data tables for users and queue, refactors admin check int…
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Introduces data tables for users and queue with column definitions, refactors admin auth check into middleware, and adds queue utilities across 9 files with 467 custom lines — a significant admin feature and architectural refactor.

prs.title: Staging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adds or updates server actions for AWS products and monthly spend, updates the AWS product selector component, and touches the readiness page across 4 files with 61 lines — solid feature work spanning data fetching and UI.

prs.title: Fix onboarding authentication and AWS product fetching
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Fixes onboarding authentication flow and AWS product fetching across the same 4 files as PR #108 with 61 custom lines, indicating meaningful bug fixes touching auth, server actions, and a UI selector component.

prs.title: Improve DOMPurify loading and error handling
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small improvement to DOMPurify loading and error handling in a single component with only 10 custom lines — a minor defensive fix.

prs.title: Debugging progress
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Only 4 lines changed in a single file as a debugging pass — trivial change.

prs.title: Improve companyId handling and add admin test page
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Improves companyId handling in the DAL, updates the AI readiness entrypoint, and adds an admin test page across 3 files with 60 custom lines — a small but meaningful multi-layer improvement.

prs.title: Debugging progress
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Debugging work spanning 5 files including the AI entrypoint, queue action, worker, and a new admin readiness-logs page with 140 custom lines — meaningful cross-cutting diagnostic and observability additions.

prs.title: Update entrypoint and apprunner config for migrations
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small infrastructure update adding migration support to the entrypoint script and App Runner config across 2 files with 8 lines.

prs.title: Update build order and add DATABASE_URL secret
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Trivial App Runner config tweak adding a DATABASE_URL secret with only 4 lines in one file.

prs.title: Update apprunner.yaml build and run configuration
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Minor App Runner build/run configuration update with 7 lines in a single YAML file.

prs.title: Update apprunner.yaml
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small App Runner YAML update with 9 lines in one file — a config tweak.

prs.title: Add error handling for analytics and editor actions
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adds error handling across 4 files (analytics, editor, slide deck client, middleware) with only 20 custom lines — small defensive improvements.

prs.title: Major Feature Release: Task Management, Admin Enhancements, and Audit System
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A transformative release spanning 69 files and 4693 custom lines covering a full task management system with drag-and-drop hierarchy, an audit/event system, admin enhancements, auth flows (password reset, email verify), schema changes, and multi-week contributions from two engineers.

prs.title: Ch/audit table
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 1531 custom lines across 36 files spanning schema changes, new audit event tracking infrastructure, multiple public-facing pages, admin views, and cross-cutting concerns represents a major feature with architectural implications.

prs.title: Admin User Management: Password & Role Controls
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 616 lines across 4 files adding password change and role management dialogs with corresponding admin actions is a solid, self-contained admin feature with meaningful UI and backend work.

stories.name: Staging Environment Deployment & Stabilization
stories.rationale: Iteratively configured and stabilized the staging environment including AppRunner setup, build order, database secrets, migration entrypoints, and final staging deployment.

stories.name: Task Management, Audit System & Admin Enhancements
stories.rationale: Delivered a major feature release combining task management, an audit table/system, and admin enhancements to give teams visibility and control over platform activity.

stories.name: Onboarding Authentication & AWS Product Integration Fix
stories.rationale: Resolved broken onboarding authentication flow and fixed AWS product fetching to ensure new users can successfully complete sign-up and access their products.

stories.name: Platform Stability & Error Handling Improvements
stories.rationale: Improved overall platform resilience by adding error handling for analytics and editor actions, fixing DOMPurify loading issues, and resolving miscellaneous bugs surfaced during debugging.

stories.name: Admin User & Queue Management Dashboard
stories.rationale: Built out a comprehensive admin experience including data tables for users and queue management, password and role controls, and improved company ID handling with a dedicated admin test page.

stories.name: Business Readiness Score Visual & Slide Deck Integration
stories.rationale: Refactored the readiness thermometer component and embedded it into the slide deck to give stakeholders a clear visual representation of business readiness.

stories.name: AI Agent Debugging & Progress Tracking
stories.rationale: Advanced debugging efforts on AI agent workflows to identify and address progress-blocking issues in the agent pipeline.
